title: Reduce CSV dataset from 2000 to 500 records

requirements.summary: Regenerate the CSV dataset file with approximately 500 records instead of 2000, maintaining the existing schema and data variety
acceptanceCriteria: CSV file contains approximately 500 records (acceptable range: 480-520 records)
All existing schema columns are preserved with correct data types
Data variety is maintained across all categorical fields
File remains downloadable from the same location in the application

file_operations.description: Regenerate the CSV dataset file with approximately 500 records instead of 2000. Maintain the existing schema with columns: Citizen_ID (12-digit text), Income_Tier, Scheme_Eligibility, Scheme_Amount (number), Last_Claim_Date (DD-MM-YYYY format), Region_Code, Account_Status (Active/Inactive), Aadhaar_Linked (TRUE/FALSE), Claim_Count (number). Preserve data variety including different income tiers (Low, Middle, High), multiple scheme types (Pension, Health, Education), various region codes, mix of Active/Inactive accounts, TRUE/FALSE Aadhaar linkage status, and claim counts ranging from 0 to 5. Generate realistic 12-digit Citizen_IDs, randomize dates in DD-MM-YYYY format, and ensure scheme amounts align with scheme types. The file must remain at the same location and name to maintain compatibility with existing application components that reference or import this dataset.
